title: NIT Mizoram Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: The National Institute of Technology Mizoram (NIT Mizoram) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies for 01 Junior Research Fellow post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.Sc., M.Sc., B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Computer Science, Electronics, Mechanical Engineering can apply for the NIT Mizoram Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in o...
